tasks.title: Xcode project + share-extension target scaffolding, App Group entitlement on both targets
acceptance_criteria: Both targets build and launch to a blank screen in simulator
App Group entitlement present and matching identifier on both targets
No feature code exists yet in this task, scaffolding only

tasks.title: Core enums and DTOs (Verdict, ProcessingOrigin, SourceOrigin, AnalysisOutcomeKind, FoundationModelsAvailability, ScopeExtractorError, BaselineClauseKind, ReviewItemDraft, ExtractionOutcome, BaselineSnapshot, BaselineClauseSnapshot, CandidateAsk, EntitlementState, PendingSharedIntake)
acceptance_criteria: All types compile exactly matching the tech_specs interfaces-json signatures
All DTOs are Sendable and Codable where specified
No @Model annotations in this file set

tasks.title: SwiftData model graph + SchemaV1/VersionedSchema
acceptance_criteria: ModelContainer initializes with SchemaV1 containing all 10 model types
App launches, creates a Project+Baseline, and the record survives relaunch
@Relationship cascade rules declared from Project to Baseline/AnalysisSession/DraftDocument

tasks.title: Cascade-delete test: Project deletion removes Baseline/AnalysisSessions/Drafts with zero orphans
acceptance_criteria: Test builds a full graph (project+baseline+clauses+session+reviewItems+draft), deletes the project, asserts zero orphaned records of any type in the container

tasks.title: ManualTaggingChunk discard/resolve invariant test
acceptance_criteria: Test asserts a chunk with isDiscarded=true is never present in the set finalizeManualAnalysis converts to ReviewItemDraft/ReviewItem; once T-013 exists this test is extended to call the real finalize path

tasks.title: Repository protocols + SwiftData-backed implementations
acceptance_criteria: Each protocol matches tech_specs signatures exactly
SwiftData-backed conformances pass a round-trip test: create/fetch/delete via repository only, no direct ModelContext access from callers

tasks.title: AskSegmenter (NaturalLanguage-backed, deterministic) + unit tests
acceptance_criteria: Given a fixed input string, output CandidateAsk array is byte-identical across repeated runs
Exact-match unit tests cover multi-sentence, single-sentence, and whitespace-only input

tasks.title: ManualScopeExtractor (instant, placeholder ReviewItemDrafts from segmenter output)
acceptance_criteria: Conforms to ScopeExtractor
Returns .items([ReviewItemDraft]) with verdict=.flaggedForReview, isResolved=false, offsets populated from CandidateAsk
Returns .nothingToFlag when segmenter yields zero candidates

tasks.title: AnalysisOrchestrator: runManualSegmentation + finalizeManualAnalysis (manual path only, runAIAnalysis stubbed to throw .modelUnavailable(.ineligibleHardware))
acceptance_criteria: runManualSegmentation maps each ReviewItemDraft into a ManualTaggingChunk (verdict dropped to nil, per the locked bridging rule)
finalizeManualAnalysis excludes isDiscarded chunks and converts only resolved chunks into ReviewItem, persists an AnalysisSession only on completion
Extends T-005's invariant test against this real code path

tasks.title: DraftGenerator
acceptance_criteria: Throws if any ReviewItem.isResolved == false
Only confirmed-billable items populate draft body, in-scope items excluded
Produced DraftDocument is immutable at construction (let fields set once)

tasks.title: ExportService: plain text/Markdown export
acceptance_criteria: Writes a real temp file to disk, returns its URL
Exported file opens correctly outside the app (Files app / Quick Look)
No entitlement dependency for plain text path

tasks.title: ShareIngressStore + on-device App Group round-trip spike (writePending/consumePending, exactly-once consume+delete, overwrite behavior)
acceptance_criteria: On a real device, sharing plain text from Notes/Mail into the extension writes a PendingSharedIntake JSON file the main app consumes exactly once and deletes
A second share before consumption overwrites the first with no queue
Documented verdict recorded: workable, or named known-limitation with reasoning if broken

tasks.title: AIScopeExtractor (Foundation Models) + availability wiring
acceptance_criteria: Gated on manual spine (T-013) passing its end-to-end fixture test first
Conforms to ScopeExtractor, populates offsets from CandidateAsk
Handles all FoundationModelsAvailability cases including evictedMidRun without crashing

tasks.title: EntitlementService + QuotaService + DebugFailureHarness, shipped and tested together
acceptance_criteria: Test: forced canRunAIExtraction=false causes runAIAnalysis to never invoke the extractor
Test: quota increments exactly once, only inside runAIAnalysis, only on completion; cancellation/interruption never increments
Forced never-synced and forced verification-issue states are reachable via the harness

tasks.title: ExportService: PDF export (PDFKit), paywall-gated
acceptance_criteria: Throws .paywalled when EntitlementService reports canUsePDFExport=false
Generated PDF opens correctly outside the app
No third-party PDF library used

tasks.title: AppRoute + RootRouteResolver + app entry routing wiring
acceptance_criteria: Synchronous route resolution before first render
Cold launch with zero/one/2+ projects routes correctly
Routes correctly given a stubbed PendingSharedIntake

tasks.title: Project List screen (view + view model)
acceptance_criteria: empty/loaded/atFreeTierLimit states all render distinctly
Create-project action calls ProjectRepository only, never SwiftData directly

tasks.title: Project Home screen
acceptance_criteria: Baseline strength badge reflects weak/healthy correctly
Past analyses list nested below fold, dominant analyze action present

tasks.title: Baseline Editor screen
acceptance_criteria: Layer 1 required, Layer 2 disclosure state persists per project across relaunch
firstTimeEmpty/editing/savedConfirmation/validationError states all reachable

tasks.title: Intake screen wired to manual path (fake AI extractor stub for AI states, real manual path)
acceptance_criteria: Accepts pasted text, autosaves via IntakeDraft continuously
switchToManual routes into ManualTagging with identical pre-filled text whether cold or via stubbed share payload
Never calls ScopeExtractor or QuotaService directly, only AnalysisOrchestrator

tasks.title: Manual Tagging screen
acceptance_criteria: Full-screen, not a sheet
tag/discard/split operate on ManualTaggingChunk only
finish() calls AnalysisOrchestrator.finalizeManualAnalysis and navigates to Review on success

tasks.title: Review screen + ReviewRowView + BottomActionBarView + VerdictChipView
acceptance_criteria: Fixed section order: flagged, newAndBillable, inScope
unresolvedCount is a computed property, never a manually tracked field
nothingToFlag renders as its own full-screen state, never a list variant
reclassify is exactly one tap

tasks.title: Draft Preview / Export screen
acceptance_criteria: Draft renders as read-only-except-fee-placeholder document view
export(.plainText) succeeds and hands a real file to UIActivityViewController
exportError state shows recovery copy, not generic failure text

tasks.title: Settings/Paywall screen
acceptance_criteria: free/paid/restoreInProgress/restoreFailed/verificationTroubleDefaultingFree states all reachable
Debug-only forced-failure toggles visually cordoned off and excluded from release builds

tasks.title: Intake AI-unavailable states + mid-run eviction wiring onto real AIScopeExtractor
acceptance_criteria: All four unavailable states plus midRunInterrupted have distinct tested copy
Cancellation and backgrounding route to a different state than model failure, and neither decrements quota

tasks.title: DesignTokens (light/dark paired)
acceptance_criteria: Distinct light/dark values for paper/ink/flagged/billable/inScope/hairline, not the same hue reused
Contrast passes WCAG AA in both modes

tasks.title: ErrorStateView + shared empty/error state module
acceptance_criteria: Every error state usage across features includes non-generic recovery copy
Component is reused by at least Intake, Review, DraftPreview, Settings

tasks.title: Accessibility pass across all screens (VoiceOver grouping, Dynamic Type, 44pt targets, Reduce Motion)
acceptance_criteria: Each Review row reads as one coherent VoiceOver element with explicit action labels
Rationale text tested at largest Dynamic Type accessibility size with no truncation
Reduce Motion replaces slide/stagger with cross-dissolve

tasks.title: Privacy manifest + logging redaction audit
acceptance_criteria: PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy declares required-reason API usage (UserDefaults at minimum)
Grep-verified: no raw client message text ever passed to os.Logger

tasks.title: Share extension picker UI + 'replaced an earlier message' toast + visual consistency
acceptance_criteria: Only proceeds if T-016's spike verdict is workable; otherwise this task is replaced by writing the documented known-limitation note
Optional project picker present in extension UI, no inference/review/draft-preview runs in-process

tasks.title: XCUITest full-loop suite: real path + forced .ineligibleHardware
acceptance_criteria: Loop runs project-create through export twice, once forced-manual, asserting a real file exists on disk both times
Test asserts draft immutability after a post-generation baseline edit

tasks.title: Real-device Foundation Models verification pass
acceptance_criteria: One documented on-device session with model available, one with it force-disabled
Findings recorded even if they surface bugs, not just a pass/fail line

tasks.title: StoreKit fail-closed drills using DebugFailureHarness
acceptance_criteria: Forced verification-issue and forced never-synced states are exercised and default to free-tier restrictions
Forced project-cap and forced non-Pro states block creation and PDF export respectively at the UI layer, matching T-018's call-site tests
